DistributorRegistered.description: Emitted when a new distributor has been registered.

DistributorRequestCanceled.description: Emitted when a distributor request has been canceled.

DistributorRequestProcessed.description: Emitted when a distributor request has been processed.

DistributorRequestProcessing.description: Emitted when a distributor request is being processed.

FundAdminRegistered.description: Emitted when a fund admin has been registered.

FundTokenAllowlistUpdated.description: Emitted when a fund token allowlist has been updated.

FundTokenRegistered.description: Emitted when a fund token has been registered.

Initialized.description: Emitted when the contract has been initialized.

InvalidDTAWallet.description: Emitted when an invalid DTA wallet is detected.

MessageFailed.description: Emitted when a CCIP message has failed.

NativeFundsRecovered.description: Emitted when native funds have been recovered.

RedemptionRequested.description: Emitted when a redemption has been requested.

SubscriptionRequested.description: Emitted when a subscription has been requested.

DTAAdded.description: Emitted when a DTA has been added to the wallet.

DTARemoved.description: Emitted when a DTA has been removed from the wallet.

DTASettlementClosed.description: Emitted when a DTA settlement has been closed.

DTASettlementOpened.description: Emitted when a DTA settlement has been opened.

CCIPMessageRecvFailed.description: Emitted when a CCIP message receive has failed.

EmptyRequestType.description: Emitted when an empty request type is encountered.

InsufficientPaymentTokenBalance.description: Emitted when there is insufficient payment token balance.

SettlementFailed.description: Emitted when a settlement has failed.

TokenWithdrawn.description: Emitted when tokens have been withdrawn.

UnauthorizedSenderDTA.description: Emitted when an unauthorized sender attempts to access DTA.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the event was created

address.description: The address of the contract that emitted the event

requestId.description: The request identifier associated with the event

topicHash.description: The topic hash of the event

timestamp.description: The unix timestamp of the transaction

chainId.description: The chain ID for the transaction

attributes.description: A map of attribute key to attribute details
